error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘attachment0’
title: Missing binary field in Extract Data Node
symptom: When attempting to process a PDF attachment, n8n throws an error indicating that the binary field 'attachment0' is missing.
applies_when: PDF attachment is passed from a previous node
not_this_if: Binary field name is correctly set to 'attachment_0'
root_cause: The Extract Data Node expects a specific binary field name to process the input data. If the field name does not match the expected name, the node cannot find the data to process, resulting in an error.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Extract Data Node
Locate the parameter for the binary input field name
Change the field name from 'data' to 'attachment_0'
Save the changes and re-run the workflow
agent_instruction: Change the binary input field name in the Extract Data Node settings to 'attachment_0'.
